mapper.select: select id, user_id, biz_date, streak_count, create_time from growth_check_in where user_id = #{userId} order by biz_date desc, id desc limit 1
select id, user_id, biz_date, streak_count, create_time from growth_check_in where user_id = #{userId} and biz_date < #{bizDate} order by biz_date desc, id desc limit 1 for update
mapper.insert: insert into growth_check_in(user_id, biz_date, streak_count, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{bizDate}, #{streakCount}, current_timestamp)
